hero.headline: JOB MANAGEMENT YOUR CREW WILL ACTUALLY USE
hero.subtext: Built by trades, for trades. Your software should handle the chaos so you don't have to.
hero.trustLine: Get started for free · No credit card · Rated 5.0
hero.founderQuote: "I scaled a deck and railing business from 0 to $1.6M in 4 years. Tried Jobber, ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro. None of them worked the way my crew actually works. So I built OPS."
painPoints.heading: YOU'RE EITHER DROWNING IN CHAOS OR PAYING FOR SOFTWARE NOBODY USES
painPoints.card1.title: GROUP TEXT HELL
painPoints.card1.forLine: For 1-10 person crews with no software
painPoints.card2.title: ENTERPRISE OVERKILL
painPoints.card2.forLine: For crews who tried Jobber/ServiceTitan and it's too much
painPoints.card3.title: TOOL SPRAWL
painPoints.card3.forLine: For operations duct-taping manual solutions together
painPoints.resolution: One app. Your crew opens it and knows what to do. No manual. No training. No dedicated IT guy necessary.
showcase.heading: BUILT BY SOMEONE WHO ACTUALLY RUNS CREWS
showcase.feature1.title: NO TRAINING REQUIRED
showcase.feature1.copy: Your crew opens it once. They see their jobs. They know what to do. That's it.
showcase.feature1.why: Every other tool requires days of training. Your guys won't use software they don't understand. OPS is obvious from the first tap.
showcase.feature2.title: PHOTO DOCUMENTATION THAT WORKS
showcase.feature2.copy: Before/after shots. Progress updates. Damage documentation. Markup with arrows and notes. All organized by job.
showcase.feature2.why: No more hunting through text chains for that one photo. Everything lives with the job it belongs to.
showcase.feature3.title: A SCHEDULE YOUR CREW ACTUALLY READS
showcase.feature3.copy: An intuitive job board and clean daily schedule. Your crew sees what's coming up, who's assigned where, and what needs to get done — all in one glance.
showcase.feature3.why: No more morning phone calls asking “where am I going today?” Your crew opens the app and they're read in.
showcase.feature4.title: DIRECT LINE TO THE BUILDER
showcase.feature4.copy: Missing a feature? Speak directly to the founder. We listen. We build what you actually need.
showcase.feature4.why: No support tickets. No chatbots. You talk to the person who built it and uses it every day.
